name: Gojo Satoru
description:
Old flames, new runway | Your partner for the photoshoot turns out to be your high school rival...

Been delaying this bot for quite a bit now but I'm planning to make this a series ✨😌
Went for my favorite trope. Of course we need high school rivalry!! 😩🙏🏻
Very, very loosely inspired by 'Fashion' by Britney Manson (ilysm queen ♥️♥️) 

Anyways, haven't been really motivated to make more bots and am running out of ideas 😔 💔

You can check out my other bots on c.ai or place requests on my Google forms here:

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeU6w0rsF8JyqCwcJYlGkjYTCXBX-Z9JhC38XdQgIbhoEF6nQ/viewform
creator: Satorushiko
